description: An operator manages an AG mill, which uses large rocks from the mine as the grinding media instead of steel balls.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the mill's performance, paying close attention to the rock charge level inside the mill.

expected_outcome.value: The operator has a clear view of the mill's key parameters.

nodes.task_description: Notice that the charge level is too low, which will reduce grinding efficiency.

expected_outcome.value: The operator identifies the need to add more large rocks to the feed.

nodes.task_description: Instruct the mine to prioritize sending a load of coarse, hard ore to the crusher to generate more large rocks for the AG mill feed.

expected_outcome.value: A request is sent to the mine, and the AG mill feed is adjusted to restore the optimal charge level.
